findings.detail: Only standard library imports (hashlib, re, dataclasses, datetime). No imports from pipeline/, no imports from sibling shadows. Clean isolation.

KEYWORD_FAMILIES aligns with EliteRegistry.DOMAIN_KEYWORDS in elite_participation.py architecture. 10 families cover the key asset domains: semiconductors, gold, crypto, energy, bonds, fx, macro, tech, real_estate, healthcare. Each domain maps to expert shadow specialties.

Input: news_items (list[dict]), user_text (str). Output: list[DetectedEvent] or list[str] (triggered domains). Session-level keyword counter state is internal to the EventDetector instance — reset_keyword_state() called per session by shadow_mother.

Public API: detect_keyword_triggers(), scan_events(), prioritize_events(), reset_keyword_state(). Each has clear single responsibility. Detection methods (detect_cb_shock, detect_geopolitical, etc.) are per-event-type extractors.
